Book A Feast for Crows (mentioned)

Ronnel Arryn was a knight of House Arryn and was the younger brother of Lord Jon Arryn. He was wed to a noblewoman from House Belmore. They had one son, Elbert Arryn.[2]

History[ ]

After Jon ascended to the lordship he named Ronnel as the Keeper of the Gates of the Moon.[3] Ronnel died of a bad belly at roughly the same time as his son Elbert was born.[2]
